description: Instruction-first architecture design and review: one read-only architect role, evidence-based design/review/scorecard/plan skills, methodology and tool skills, and report/design/plan templates.

defaultPrompt: Review this repo's architecture and score the risks.
Design target architecture for this requirement.
interface.longDescription: Use an evidence-based architect role and skills to design target architecture, review observed structure, score modularity and coupling risks, and produce incremental refactoring plans.
interface.shortDescription: Evidence-based architecture design, review, scoring, and planning.

name: architecture
